name: Mexican green wave
description: A vibrant explosion of Mexican flavors with jalapeños, onions, and crisp capsicum.

name: Indi tandoori paneer
description: Authentic tandoori-spiced paneer chunks with spicy red paprika and fresh coriander.

name: Double chicken sausage
description: The ultimate treat for poultry lovers, loaded with extra layers of zesty chicken sausage.

name: Grilled veal cooked
description: Tender grilled veal strips on a smoky base, perfectly balanced with caramelized onions.

name: Zesty Garden Delight
description: A refreshing vegetarian treat with lime-infused zucchini, bell peppers, and fresh cilantro.

name: Paneer Tikka Supreme
description: Premium smoked paneer marinated in tikka masala, topped with mint chutney drizzle.

name: Spicy Pepperoni Blast
description: Double-layered spicy pepperoni with a kick of jalapeños and crushed chili flakes.

name: BBQ Beef Brisket
description: Slow-cooked savory beef brisket on a robust BBQ sauce base with sweet corn kernels.

name: Creamy Garlic Mediterranean
description: A sophisticated white-base pizza featuring roasted garlic, baby spinach, and tangy feta.

name: Hot Curry Fiesta
description: A spicy curry-infused sauce base loaded with baby corn, green chilies, and crunchy peppers.
